Noted. The uploaded artifacts are forensic data (JSON metadata, topic list, JPG frames) — not executable code, so no malware analysis applies. Proceeding with the scenario analysis.

Frame 0045s and 0075s look nearly identical — the car hasn't moved in 30s. Let me check frames throughout the timeline to establish motion patterns.
Frame 0135s looks identical to 0045s — vehicle stuck at the same gate for ~90s. Then by 0195s it's moved to a new location (on a residential street). Let me continue sampling.

{
  "timeline": [
    {"t_s": 15, "event": "Camera stream fully saturated (near-white frame)", "evidence": "frame_0015s.jpg: entire image > ~240 luma, only faint blue LiDAR overlay visible. Indicates auto-exposure / gain not converged at bag start."},
    {"t_s": 45, "event": "Ego stationary at parking-area exit behind raised drop-arm barrier", "evidence": "frame_0045s.jpg: parked sedans to the left, kiosk/booth mid-frame, yellow+black barrier arm, pedestrian and small hand-cart on near lane. Hood pose identical across next three samples."},
    {"t_s": 75, "event": "Still stationary at same gate (delta ≈ 0)", "evidence": "frame_0075s.jpg: pixel-for-pixel match with t=45 on the ego hood crest, barrier arm angle, parked-car positions."},
    {"t_s": 105, "event": "Still stationary; pedestrian/cart still occupying path", "evidence": "frame_0105s.jpg: identical framing; cart drifted a few px but ego has not progressed."},
    {"t_s": 135, "event": "Still stationary (~90 s cumulative dwell with obstacle present)", "evidence": "frame_0135s.jpg: identical viewpoint; no yaw/position change. No honk, no rerouting attempt observable."},
    {"t_s": 165, "event": "Ego finally moving; passes pedestrian at very close lateral clearance on the sidewalk", "evidence": "frame_0165s.jpg: woman in dark dress standing at left edge within ~0.8 m of front-left corner of hood while ego is already on a new residential street."},
    {"t_s": 195, "event": "Cruising down residential street under dimming sky", "evidence": "frame_0195s.jpg: parked pickup+SUV right, clear lane center, power lines overhead, lamps not yet lit."},
    {"t_s": 225, "event": "Passing through shaded tree canopy with sun-flare on road", "evidence": "frame_0225s.jpg: strong luminance gradient left-to-right, possible exposure stress again under dappled light."},
    {"t_s": 255, "event": "Approaching unmarked speed bump / hump", "evidence": "frame_0255s.jpg: yellow-striped hump spanning full lane directly ahead. No slowdown cue visible in sparse sampling."},
    {"t_s": 285, "event": "Narrow shared lane with bilateral parked cars; low drivable corridor width", "evidence": "frame_0285s.jpg: parked hatchbacks left, SUV + pickup right, corridor ≈ one car-width."},
    {"t_s": 345, "event": "Motorcycle ahead in lane, person seated on right-side bench", "evidence": "frame_0345s.jpg: motorcyclist centered ~15 m ahead; elderly person on bench close to curb."},
    {"t_s": 405, "event": "Following a white Peugeot at short range", "evidence": "frame_0405s.jpg: lead car occupies ≈40 % of image area vertically; estimated gap < 1 car length at low urban speed (tailgate risk)."},
    {"t_s": 465, "event": "Severely cracked asphalt; potential IMU/odometry noise", "evidence": "frame_0465s.jpg: dense craquelure pattern across full lane."},
    {"t_s": 525, "event": "Navigating narrow residential corridor", "evidence": "frame_0525s.jpg: parked silver hatchback on left very close to ego left-front."},
    {"t_s": 615, "event": "Continuing through quiet residential grid", "evidence": "frame_0615s.jpg: cobblestone strip center-right, no dynamic obstacles."},
    {"t_s": 705, "event": "Approaching zebra crossing", "evidence": "frame_0705s.jpg: white-striped crosswalk ahead; parked white sedan on left close to lane."},
    {"t_s": 795, "event": "Entering denser semi-commercial strip; overhead wire clutter", "evidence": "frame_0795s.jpg: power-line tangle, informal shops left, parked cars right."},
    {"t_s": 886, "event": "Passing industrial / workshop frontage; forklift and parked car on right close to path", "evidence": "frame_0886s.jpg: orange forklift on shoulder, white hatchback crossing into ego lane from right."},
    {"t_s": 946, "event": "Final sampled frame: alley lined with graffitied walls, no traffic, approaching dead-end building", "evidence": "frame_0946s.jpg: empty industrial alley; mission likely ended shortly after in this area."}
  ],
  "hypotheses": [
    {
      "id": 0,
      "title": "Planner deadlock at gated egress (no timeout-to-assist escalation)",
      "description": "Behavior planner blocks indefinitely when the lane ahead contains a low-speed pedestrian-with-cart beneath a raised drop-arm barrier. Ego sits >90 s (frames 0045–0135 are pose-identical) without honking, creeping, requesting remote assistance, or abandoning the goal. This is the dominant anomaly in the bag.",
      "supporting_evidence": ["4 consecutive 30-s-spaced frames show zero pose change", "dynamic obstacle (cart+pedestrian) remained within lane for the entire dwell", "barrier arm was already up, so no physical reason to wait"],
      "refuting_evidence": ["Camera-only view; possibly planner was intentionally yielding to pedestrian (legally correct) but absence of any progress or escalation within ~90 s still indicates a missing liveness guard"],
      "confidence": 0.7
    },
    {
      "id": 1,
      "title": "Camera auto-exposure / gain failed to converge at session start",
      "description": "Frame at t=15 s is uniformly saturated white. Perception stack dependent on /cam1 for forward classification would have operated with severely degraded signal for at least the first 15–30 s, contributing to the hesitation at the gate.",
      "supporting_evidence": ["frame_0015s.jpg has global luminance > 240 with only faint LiDAR overlay visible", "vehicle is near-stationary through t≈155 s, consistent with perception-driven hesitation"],
      "refuting_evidence": ["Other cam streams (cam3/4/6) are available at similar rates and may not have been saturated", "Later frames (t≥45 s) show correctly exposed imagery, so the fault self-cleared"],
      "confidence": 0.4
    },
    {
      "id": 2,
      "title": "Close-proximity pedestrian pass-through (unsafe lateral clearance)",
      "description": "At t=165 s ego resumes motion and passes a pedestrian with estimated lateral clearance < 1 m off the front-left corner. Planner appears to prioritize progress once movement resumes, with no enlarged safety bubble around the previously blocking agent.",
      "supporting_evidence": ["frame_0165s.jpg: pedestrian's lower body is cropped by the hood edge at very short range"],
      "refuting_evidence": ["Pedestrian may be on the sidewalk (not in the drivable surface); camera geometry can exaggerate proximity"],
      "confidence": 0.3
    },
    {
      "id": 3,
      "title": "Tailgating lead vehicle at low speed",
      "description": "At t=405 s the white Peugeot lead car fills ~40 % of the forward image with no visible brake-light reaction from ego. Time-headway appears below 1 s.",
      "supporting_evidence": ["frame_0405s.jpg lead-vehicle bounding size is large (close follow distance)"],
      "refuting_evidence": ["Single-frame snapshot; may be instantaneous peak that was corrected in inter-frame control (not observable at 30 s sampling)"],
      "confidence": 0.25
    },
    {
      "id": 4,
      "title": "Un-handled speed bump / road-surface hazard",
      "description": "Frames at t=255 s (speed bump) and t=465 s (severely cracked pavement) show surfaces that can inject pose/odometry noise. No evidence of anomaly alone, but could compound with (1) if sensor health monitors reacted.",
      "supporting_evidence": ["frame_0255s.jpg striped speed bump across lane", "frame_0465s.jpg craquelure crack pattern"],
      "refuting_evidence": ["No bag-level effect observed"],
      "confidence": 0.1
    }
  ],
  "root_cause_idx": 0,
  "patch_proposal": {
    "summary": "Add a liveness / progress-watchdog to the behavior planner so that any stationary-behind-dynamic-obstacle state longer than N seconds escalates instead of waiting indefinitely.",
    "affected_component": "behavior_planner / mission_executor (lane-following & yielding state machine)",
    "change_type": "behavioral-policy + monitor, no code rewrite performed",
    "details": [
      "Introduce state 'BLOCKED_BY_DYNAMIC_OBSTACLE' that is entered whenever ego speed < 0.1 m/s for > 5 s with a tracked obstacle in the drivable corridor.",
      "On entry, start a progress timer. Threshold T1 = 15 s: emit a short courtesy signal (horn / external HMI) and re-plan laterally within legal road width to attempt a gentle bypass.",
      "Threshold T2 = 45 s: request remote-assistance (teleop confirm) and transmit perception snapshot (cam1/3/4/6 + /velodyne_points ring buffer).",
      "Threshold T3 = 90 s with no operator response: execute a safe abort (pull-over, minimum-risk-condition, alert ops), rather than remaining in the lane.",
      "Orthogonally, add a camera-exposure health check: if median luminance of /cam1/image_raw/compressed stays > 240 for > 2 s, raise a SENSOR_DEGRADED flag that gates forward motion until the stream recovers.",
      "Add a minimum-lateral-clearance constraint to the trajectory planner (e.g. ≥ 1.0 m around pedestrians classified as adult, scaled by ego speed) to prevent the close-pass seen at t=165 s when traffic resumes.",
      "Add a dynamic time-headway constraint (≥ 1.2 s at urban speeds) in the ACC/car-follow module to mitigate the close follow seen at t=405 s."
    ],
    "verification": [
      "Replay 1_cam-lidar.bag with patched planner and assert that the stationary episode at t≈45–135 s triggers T1 within 15 s, escalates to T2 within 45 s, and does not remain silent for 90 s.",
      "Regression unit test: synthetic obstacle parked in lane for 120 s → planner must emit assist-request and never exceed dwell budget.",
      "Sensor-health test: inject fully-saturated camera for 10 s → SENSOR_DEGRADED flag set, motion inhibited, flag clears within 1 s of recovery.",
      "Scenario test: pedestrian standing 0.8 m from corridor edge → ego slows and enlarges clearance to ≥ 1.0 m or stops."
    ]
  }
}

barrier arm raised; pedestrian and small cart in near lane; parked sedans left."},{"source":"camera","topic_or_file":"frame_0075s.jpg","t_ns":75000000000,"snippet":"Same viewpoint as t=45s — hood crest, barrier angle, parked-car positions identical; >45s escalate to remote assistance; >90s execute minimum-risk pull-over."},{"bug_class":"sensor_degradation","confidence":0.5,"summary":"Forward camera stream is globally saturated at session start, indicating auto-exposure/gain failed to converge for the first ~15-30s.","evidence":[{"source":"camera","topic_or_file":"frame_0015s.jpg","t_ns":15000000000,"snippet":"Entire image near-white (luma>240); only faint blue LiDAR projection overlay visible — no scene content recoverable."}],"patch_hint":"Add camera-health monitor: if median luminance > 240 for >2s, raise SENSOR_DEGRADED and inhibit forward motion until stream recovers; verify AE initial gain/shutter on node start."},{"bug_class":"near_miss","confidence":0.35,"summary":"When ego finally resumes motion it passes the previously-blocking pedestrian at very small lateral clearance off the front-left corner.","evidence":[{"source":"camera","topic_or_file":"frame_0165s.jpg","t_ns":165000000000,"snippet":"Woman in dark dress at extreme left image edge, lower body cropped by hood line — estimated lateral gap <1 m while ego is moving."}],"patch_hint":"Enforce minimum lateral clearance (>=1.0 m scaled by speed) around pedestrian-class obstacles in trajectory optimizer; slow or halt if constraint infeasible."}],"root_cause_idx":0,"patch_proposal":"Primary: add liveness/progress watchdog to behavior planner with tiered escalation (courtesy signal -> remote assist -> safe pull-over) so ego cannot dwell indefinitely behind a dynamic obstacle. Secondary: camera-saturation health gate and pedestrian lateral-clearance constraint."}
